personal.name: Khushi Manik
personal.headline: I design intelligent products that turn messy data into clear human decisions.
personal.intro: Based in Mumbai, I build machine learning systems, full-stack tools, and research-led products that feel practical, measurable, and real.
personal.availability: Open to internships, research roles, and product engineering opportunities.
personal.about: AI & Data Science student at VESIT with a passion for building intelligent solutions. I specialize in machine learning, full-stack development, and data analysis. Currently working on projects that combine AI with practical real-world applications to create meaningful impact.

portfolio.title: AI-Based Outfit Recommendation System
portfolio.description: Personalized fashion assistant using ensemble ML models for body type prediction and outfit recommendations with 85% accuracy
portfolio.impact: Built an ensemble recommendation flow that improved fashion matching accuracy to 85%.
highlights: Combined body type prediction with outfit ranking.
Focused on personal relevance instead of generic catalog output.
Designed as a product, not just a model demo.

portfolio.title: Menstrual Health Web App
portfolio.description: Comprehensive health tracking app with period prediction, fertility tracking, and cycle insights (90% prediction accuracy)
portfolio.impact: Shipped a health tracking experience with prediction accuracy near 90% and clearer user guidance.
highlights: Built cycle tracking and fertility insight features.
Worked across frontend experience and predictive logic.
Focused on clarity for a sensitive, high-use workflow.

portfolio.title: Crawl Hub
portfolio.description: Full-stack web crawler with Django backend, reducing manual data collection time by 70%
portfolio.impact: Reduced manual data collection effort by 70% with a full-stack crawling workflow.
highlights: Connected backend crawling with a usable web interface.
Optimized for practical speed gains, not just technical correctness.

portfolio.title: Research Platform
portfolio.description: Research assistant platform with NLP and ML integration for paper summarization and researcher matchmaking
portfolio.impact: Used NLP and ML to make research discovery and collaboration faster for students and researchers.
highlights: Summarized research papers for quicker review.
Framed AI features around collaboration outcomes.

experience.title: Artificial Intelligence Intern
experience.description: Worked on identifying shopping trends using Python and ML on 3900+ data points, improving accuracy by 35%

experience.title: Student Summer Intern

experience.description: Developed comprehensive Menstrual Health web app using React and FastAPI with 90% prediction accuracy
